roadmap.title: Ecosystem
items: Airdrop and CEX listing targets in Q3-Q4 2026

faq.question: What is Tsunonton ($TSUN)?
faq.answer: Tsunonton is an anime-themed TON community token and GameFi concept. In-game points are separate from $TSUN and have no monetary value.

faq.question: Can I earn guaranteed profit?
faq.answer: No. There are no guarantees of profit or rewards. Crypto assets are volatile and can lose value quickly.

faq.question: Where can I verify contract and liquidity?
faq.answer: Use Tonviewer for contract checks and TonRaffles for lock records. Always verify links and addresses manually.

faq.question: How can I follow game updates?
faq.answer: Follow @tsunonton and @tsunonton_bot on Telegram. The clicker game is still under development.
